articles.title: Elon Musk’s father plans to raise up to $200 million with ‘Musk It’ meme coin to fund new think tank
articles.description: Errol Musk, father of tech mogul Elon Musk, plans to raise between $150 million and $200 million through a meme coin called "Musk It" to fund a new for-profit think tank, the "Musk Institute," Fortune reported Thursday.The institute is focused on engineering projects, including, as Errol suggests, advancements beyond rocket technology. The elder Musk and his business partner Nathan Browne have collaborated with a Middle Eastern-based crypto company that launched the token in December."I'm the...
